# INTENT

## User Request

Temporarily stop redirecting paid pricing buttons to Polar checkout and send users to a contact form instead.

## Requested Outcome

Standard and Plus buttons should lead to a form with a notice that automated payments are coming soon, while keeping the Polar checkout flow easy to restore.

## Constraints

- Do not remove the Polar checkout flow entirely.
- Keep switching back simple.
- Preserve existing contact form behavior.
